feature_title: Plan - Upstream Kima Hub Skipped Waves (Archived Closed)

companion_files.name: PLAN.md
companion_files.content:
# Plan - Upstream Kima Hub Skipped Waves (Archived Closed)

## Document Status

- Last updated: 2026-02-18
- Feature: Permanently archived wave scopes for upstream kima-hub sync
- State: Archived/closed by explicit user priority

## Purpose

Record non-priority upstream reconciliation waves that were explicitly closed and archived with no planned reactivation.

## Archived Closed Waves

1. `wave-00-baseline-remote-hygiene`
2. `wave-01-toolchain-infra`
3. `wave-02-db-schema-migrations`
4. `wave-06-frontend-pages-features-api`
5. `wave-07-sidecars-assets-services`
6. `wave-08-docs-release-ledgers`
7. `wave-09-integration-hardening`

Wave planning documents are stored in `waves/` under this archived directory.

## Closure Reason

User-directed scope narrowing to prioritize only:

1. backend core (`wave-03`)
2. soulseek stack (`wave-04`)
3. frontend audio/howler replacement (`wave-05`)

## Reactivation

No reactivation is planned. Any future re-open requires a new explicit user instruction and a new plan/queue track.
